summary: A Go-based testing and assertion framework with plugin support and Kubernetes integration, currently progressing through early v0.x releases.
concerns: Key insight files are test files, suggesting core logic may lack dedicated implementation files or is tightly coupled with tests
No visible API or interface definitions in hot files
Heavy reliance on config directories (.claude, .gorchestra, GOrchestra) may indicate configuration sprawl
suggestions: Review internal/detector/ and internal/reporter/ for missing non-test implementation files
Consolidate or document the multiple config directories
Focus on v0.4 roadmap priorities as indicated by recent commits
